title: psacalium nanum
intro: Psacalium nanum, also known as yerba de tigre or tiger's herb, is a perennial plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help in treating various health conditions such as fever, colds, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Psacalium nanum include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and promote digestive health, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of Psacalium nanum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to soothe sore throats, calm coughs, and support immune function.
